2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="start-page skin-nhoelektro"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <div class="site-header__main">
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h6

<h6 style="text-align: right;"><a href="https://butikken.nhoelektro.no/forside.asp" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Gå til butikken">Butikken</a>  |  <a href="https://minside.nhoelektro.no/" rel
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://elmagasinet.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Elmagasinet</a></h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5

MODERATE

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

https://www.nhoelektro.no/produkter-og-tjenester/elflix/elflix/dette-far-du/
Avvik: 19 | Bestått: 71
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="/produkter-og-tjenester/elflix/elflix/dette-far-du/"> <img alt="logo" src="/contentassets/6df79606ba6947d693b959e538935dc8/nho_elektro_rgb_elflix.svg"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Alltid tilgjengelig. Repeter når du vil.</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: center;">Se alle Trailere i Elflix</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" aria-label='Eksempel fra Elflix-kurset "FSE - lavspenning"' data-cookieconsent="ignore" frameborder="0" src="https://player.

Lokalforeningene

https://www.nhoelektro.no/om-oss/lokalforeningene/
Avvik: 94 | Bestått: 167
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)

First heading is h3, should start with h1

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:tommy.skauen@nho.no" target="_blank"> tommy.skauen@nho.no </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:tommy.skauen@nho.no" target="_blank"> tommy.skauen@nho.no </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (88 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Hvorfor bli medlem?

https://www.nhoelektro.no/medlemskap/hvorfor-bli-medlem/
Avvik: 102 | Bestått: 109
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h6

<h6 style="text-align: center;">Våre medlemsfordeler gjør det enklere for deg å drive lønnsomt.</h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Hva koster medlemskapet?</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/medlemskap/innmelding/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/07f9e8de5dde4340b0ee
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/medlemskap/innmelding/" target="_blank"> <span>Bli medlem</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/medlemskap/kontingent/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/medlemskap/kontingent/" target="_blank"> <span>Regn ut medlemsavgiften</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/medlemskap/" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/om-oss/lokalforeningene/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/om-oss/lokalforeningene/" target="_blank"> <span>Finn din lokalforening</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (89 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" aria-label="Video som viser arbeidsgiverportalen arbinn" data-cookieconsent="ignore" frameborder="0" src="https://player.vim
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (64 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til egen side om Ove Guttormsen'

<a aria-hidden="true" aria-label="Gå til egen side om Ove Guttormsen" href="/om-oss/ansatte/guttormsen-ove/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" class="block-person-image" height="464" loading="lazy" src

MINOR

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (93 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Teknisk veileder</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h6

<h6><span style="font-family: 'Helvetica Neue'; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none; mso-fareast-language: N
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h6

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

id="Luft"

Kunnskapsløftet

https://www.nhoelektro.no/kunnskapsloftet/
Avvik: 99 | Bestått: 114
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>NEK 400 og 399 seminarer</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/kunnskapsloftet/mersalg/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/20549977e6734680a9
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/kunnskapsloftet/mersalg/" target="_blank"> <span>Bestill kurset her</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://etiskhacker.no/nho-elektro/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/efe30eb7
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="https://etiskhacker.no/nho-elektro/" target="_blank"> <span>Mer info</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/kunnskapsloftet/digital-sikkerhet/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/dba2ed6ec2f7440aa1c63499
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/medlemskap/medlemsfordeler/aktuelt/nelfos-digitale-medlemspakke/nek-399-og-400-gratis/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/medlemskap/medlemsfordeler/aktuelt/nelfos-digitale-medlemspakke/nek-399-og-400-gratis/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (88 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>

Integrator

https://www.nhoelektro.no/produkter-og-tjenester/integrator/om/
Avvik: 14 | Bestått: 54
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="/"> <img alt="logo" src="/siteassets/nho_elektro_rgb.svg"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="site-footer__column-heading"> NHO Elektro </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a href="#navigation"> <span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="new-header-mobile-nav-toggler campaign-header" role="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-list new-header-mobile-nav-toggler
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Søk

https://www.nhoelektro.no/sok/?tag=%25c3%2598konomi%2Bog%2BProsjektledelse
Avvik: 108 | Bestått: 125
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-nhoelektro"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <div class="site-header__main"> <div class
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="more" href="/kurs/klasseromkurs/2025-09-09-prosjektledelse-1-planlegging-styring-og-oppfolging/"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a class="block-meta-url" href="/kurs/klasseromkurs/2025-09-09-prosjektledelse-1-planlegging-styring-og-oppfolging/">https://www.nhoelektro.no/kurs/klasseromkurs/2025-09-09-prosjektledelse-1-planleggi

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (93 avvik)

SERIOUS

<a class="menu-link" href="/medlemskap/tall-og-fakta/"><span>Økonomiske rapporter og analyser</span></a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Ekom

https://www.nhoelektro.no/elektroteknikk/ekom/
Avvik: 96 | Bestått: 116
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/cb1af3564d7c41c992e9b7884352ebaa/bredutbyggingsloven2cta.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/39b2ccc4067143529a5cc41641fc17a9/ekom-cta.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/39b2ccc40671435
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/bbe1c5fde4664c2b8d8feb02843c9872/nina-hansen-soa-ikt-rapport-v2.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/content
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/januar/krav-til-passive-foringsveier/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/cb1af3564d7c41c992e9b7884352ebaa/bredutbygg
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/elektroteknikk/fagartikler/dokumentasjonspakke-ekom-bolig/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/39b2ccc4067143529a5cc41641fc17a9/eko
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/mars/ny-rapport-elektrobedriftene-blir-mer-digitale/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/bbe1c5fde4664c2b8d8feb02843c
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Luft' appears 2 times

id="Luft"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Rettighets- og ansvarserklæring

https://www.nhoelektro.no/om-oss/personvernerklaring-og-cookies/rettighets--og-ansvarserklaring/
Avvik: 96 | Bestått: 97
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (93 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-nhoelektro"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <div class="site-header__main"> <div class
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: center;">Elektropodden inviterer spennende gjester som er eksperter på sine felt og utfordrer de til å svare på ting mange lurer på. Hvordan er ståa på solkraft? Er batterier fa
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

MODERATE

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)

SERIOUS

id="Luft"

NM 2026

https://www.nhoelektro.no/utdanning/nm-2026/
Avvik: 116 | Bestått: 110
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="47" src="/contentassets/9f499e632a1444b494dab09f9637e6f6/onninen.svg" style="display: block; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;" width="337"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="52" src="/contentassets/70795ae0ae004a119c096d829d38e15c/lanse.svg" style="display: block; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;" width="160"/>
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-nhoelektro"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <div class="site-header__main"> <div class
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5><strong>NM i regi av NHO Elektro – stedet der unge fagfolk løfter seg til neste nivå</strong></h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5>Som deltaker får du:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h6

<h6><a href="https://sf-nelfo-admin-prod-web.azurewebsites.net/quiz/o6hllU65tI_oNK208p2nyA" rel="noopener" target="_blank">1. Test ut NM-quiz →</a></h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h6

Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Luft' appears 5 times

id="Luft"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'elektriker-forste-uttak' appears 2 times

id="elektriker-forste-uttak"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Hva koster medlemskapet?

https://www.nhoelektro.no/medlemskap/kontingent/
Avvik: 95 | Bestått: 99
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-nhoelektro"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <div class="site-header__main"> <div class
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: center;"><a href="/medlemskap/nho-elektro-grunder-kampanje/">Gratis NHO Elektro Gründer-medlemskap i to år </a>→</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://mkk.nhoelektro.no/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="https://mkk.nhoelektro.no/" target="_blank"> <span>Regn ut medlemsavgiften</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-nhoelektro"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <div class="site-header__main"> <div class
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Tar bedriftene inn flere lærlinger i år?

https://www.nhoelektro.no/artikler/2026/februar/Laerlingmarkedet-i-2026/
Avvik: 98 | Bestått: 106
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Dette sier bedriftene</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/om-oss/ansatte/larsen-svein-harald/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (93 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search-comp__submitbtn" type="submit"> <span class="ph-light ph-magnifying-glass icon--large search-comp__submitbtn-icon"></span> </button>

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Elektroteknikk

https://www.nhoelektro.no/elektroteknikk/
Avvik: 100 | Bestått: 117
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Dokumentasjon</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h4 to h6

<h6 style="text-align: center;"><a href="/elektroteknikk/elektropodden/">NHO Elektros podcast som tar opp spørsmål fra elektrobransjen →</a></h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h5 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/elektroteknikk/elsikkerhet/Dokumentasjon/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/27271f226c4b4192a
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Luft' appears 2 times

id="Luft"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (93 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>

Søk

https://www.nhoelektro.no/sok/?tag=Manuell%2Bprosjektering
Avvik: 100 | Bestått: 95
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-nhoelektro"> <a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a> <header class="site-header" id="site-header"> <div class="site-header__main"> <div class
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/nhoelektro"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="more" href="/kurs/klasseromkurs/2026-24-02_manuell-prosjektering/"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a class="block-meta-url" href="/kurs/klasseromkurs/2026-24-02_manuell-prosjektering/">https://www.nhoelektro.no/kurs/klasseromkurs/2026-24-02_manuell-prosjektering</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (93 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search-comp__submitbtn" type="submit"> <span class="ph-light ph-magnifying-glass icon--large search-comp__submitbtn-icon"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="searc-input-header-mobile" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>

SERIOUS

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search-comp__submitbtn" type="submit"> <span class="ph-light ph-magnifying-glass icon--large search-comp__submitbtn-icon"></span> </button>

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://nelfo.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://nelfo.no --max-pages 21 --format html
